info.title: Latchshot API
info.description: Render public HTTP and HTTPS web pages as PNG or JPEG screenshots and PDF documents. Targets are checked against private and special-use networks before rendering. Create one recurring Free-plan key per email, then send that key as an HTTPS Bearer token. Only successful renders consume monthly quota; automatic overages are disabled.

externalDocs.description: Latchshot developer documentation, limits, diagnostics, and quickstarts

tags.name: Access
tags.description: Create a Free-plan key and inspect its quota.

tags.name: Rendering
tags.description: Capture supported public web pages as image or PDF artifacts.

tags.name: Plans
tags.description: Request a higher paid quota without replacing the current key.

tags.name: Implementation
tags.description: Request owner review of bounded public-repository implementation services.

post.description: Issues one Free-plan key per email and returns it once. Only email is required; workflow context and contact permission are optional. The allowance renews to 100 successful renders at the start of each UTC calendar month. Limited to three issuance attempts per client IP per hour.

201.description: Free-plan key created; the plaintext key is returned only in this response

post.summary: Request owner review of one implementation pilot
post.description: Records one deduplicated, owner-reviewed request for the fixed-scope $99 implementation pilot. Requires one exact public GitHub repository, one JavaScript/TypeScript/Python backend call site, non-secret contract details, explicit repository authority and reply consent, and acknowledgment that payment and work start only after separate owner confirmation. Does not issue an API key, take payment, reserve work, or authorize a repository change. Limited to three attempts per client IP per hour.

201.description: New pilot request recorded for owner review

200.description: Existing request for this email and repository updated for owner review

post.summary: Request owner review of one screenshot endpoint
post.description: Records one deduplicated, owner-reviewed request for the fixed-scope $149 screenshot endpoint safety review. Requires one exact public GitHub repository, one JavaScript/TypeScript/Python route, non-secret control and test details, explicit repository authority and reply consent, and acknowledgment that payment and work start only after separate owner confirmation. Does not grant repository access, take payment, reserve work, or authorize a code change. Limited to three attempts per client IP per hour.

201.description: New safety review request recorded for owner review

200.description: Existing request for this email and repository updated for owner review

get.description: Returns process health and the current render queue state. No API key is required and this request does not consume render quota.

Captures one supported public URL as PNG or JPEG. The URL must resolve only to public addresses and use HTTP or HTTPS on port 80 or 443. Successful responses are binary image bodies; diagnostic and quota values are returned in response headers. Only a successful render consumes monthly quota.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Public HTTP or HTTPS page URL to capture.

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: Viewport height in CSS pixels. Ignored for the final artifact when fullPage is true.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Binary image format returned in the response body.

parameters.name: quality
parameters.description: JPEG encoding quality from 1 to 100. Valid only when format is jpeg.

parameters.name: fullPage
parameters.description: When true, capture the bounded full document height instead of only the viewport.

parameters.name: scrollPage
parameters.description: For a fullPage screenshot, perform a bounded deterministic scroll before capture to activate lazy content. Does not click, type, or run caller-supplied actions.

parameters.name: darkMode
parameters.description: Emulate a dark color-scheme preference for the page.

parameters.name: blockAds
parameters.description: Best-effort blocking of requests to known third-party ad hosts.

parameters.name: blockTrackers
parameters.description: Best-effort blocking of requests to known third-party analytics and tracker hosts.

parameters.name: blockChats
parameters.description: Best-effort blocking and hiding of known third-party chat widgets.

parameters.name: hideCookieBanners
parameters.description: Hide common cookie-consent overlays after loading. This does not click consent or set consent cookies.

parameters.name: hidePopups
parameters.description: Hide common newsletter, signup, and discount popups without clicking or submitting them.

200.description: Rendered image. Diagnostic, rate-limit, and quota values are returned in headers.

post.description: Captures one supported public URL using bounded screenshot or PDF options. The response body is the binary artifact, not JSON. Diagnostic and quota values are returned in headers. Only a successful render consumes monthly quota.

200.description: Rendered image or PDF. Diagnostic, rate-limit, and quota values are returned in headers.

post.description: Authenticates the current quota-metered key and records one deduplicated paid-plan request. No payment is taken. The owner replies to the email attached to the key and activates the same key only after confirming payment.

get.description: Returns the authenticated key's current plan, successful-render allowance, consumption counters, next UTC calendar-month reset time, any paid-plan request attached to the key, and stable plan, upgrade, and implementation-pilot links. This request does not consume render quota or initiate an upgrade; it does not take payment or start implementation work.

200.description: Current plan, quota usage, optional paid-plan request, and informational continuation links

bearerAuth.description: Send the one-time Latchshot key in the Authorization header as Bearer YOUR_KEY. Keys are stored only as hashes.

Navigation.description: Whether navigation completed normally or reached its bounded timeout after a usable page response.

Scroll.description: Whether bounded lazy-content scrolling completed or the option was off.

QuotaRemaining.description: Successful renders remaining in the current UTC calendar month after this response.

QuotaReset.description: UTC date-time when the monthly successful-render allowance replenishes.

UsageUrl.description: Authenticated read-only plan, quota, request-state, and continuation endpoint. Following this URL does not consume render quota or change a plan.

PaidPlanUrl.description: Optional owner-managed paid-plan request form. Following this URL does not take payment or change a plan.

ImplementationPilotUrl.description: Optional bounded implementation-pilot contract. Following this URL starts neither payment nor implementation work.

email.description: Address the owner may use only to reply about this pilot request.

repositoryUrl.description: Exact public GitHub repository under the requester's control.

callSite.description: One relative repository file path for the existing backend provider call.

currentContract.description: Non-secret current request, synchronous output, and application-owned byte handling.

requiredBehavior.description: Provider behavior that must be preserved, or none when only synchronous artifact bytes are required.

acceptanceSample.description: Safe description of one maintainer-approved public page and required artifact shape.

repositoryAuthority.description: Confirms authority to review, merge, deploy, and roll back the public repository change.

safetyAcknowledged.description: Confirms removal of credentials, private or signed URLs, customer data, payment details, and sensitive artifacts.

startBoundaryAcknowledged.description: Confirms that no payment or work starts before separate owner confirmation.

replyConsent.description: Allows the owner to email only about this pilot request.

notice.description: Confirms owner review and the no-payment/no-work-start boundary.

email.description: Address the owner may use only to reply about this safety-review request.

repositoryUrl.description: Exact public GitHub repository under the requester's control.

routePath.description: One relative repository file path for the existing screenshot endpoint or worker.

currentControls.description: Non-secret current URL, network, browser, resource, and caller controls.

testEvidence.description: Non-sensitive description of current happy-path and rejection tests, or none.

desiredOutcome.description: Requested risk report, focused patch, regression tests, and handoff outcome.

repositoryAuthority.description: Confirms authority to review, merge, deploy, and roll back the public repository change.

safetyAcknowledged.description: Confirms removal of credentials, private or signed URLs, customer data, production details, payment information, and sensitive artifacts.

startBoundaryAcknowledged.description: Confirms that no payment or work starts before separate owner confirmation.

replyConsent.description: Allows the owner to email only about this safety-review request.

notice.description: Confirms owner review and the no-payment/no-work-start boundary.

name.description: Optional display name for owner review.

email.description: Email used to enforce one lifetime Free-plan key. It does not grant contact permission.

consent.description: Optional permission for the owner to send product-fit guidance.

url.description: Public HTTP or HTTPS page URL. Private, loopback, link-local, special-use, credential-bearing, and non-web-port targets are rejected.

format.description: Exact artifact format. PDF selects PDF rendering even when kind is omitted.

quality.description: JPEG encoding quality. Valid only for JPEG screenshots.

scale.description: Device scale factor used for image capture.

fullPage.description: Capture the bounded full document height for screenshots.

scrollPage.description: Deterministically scroll before capture to activate lazy content. Requires a fullPage screenshot; bounded to 48 steps, 5 seconds, and a 20,000-pixel document height. Does not click, type, or run caller-supplied actions.

waitUntil.description: Browser lifecycle event awaited before the optional delay.

delay.description: Additional bounded wait in milliseconds after the lifecycle event.

timeout.description: Navigation timeout in milliseconds. A separate hard process deadline still applies.

reducedMotion.description: Emulate reduced motion to improve capture stability.

blockAds.description: Best-effort blocking of requests to known third-party ad hosts. This is not anti-bot bypass.

blockTrackers.description: Best-effort blocking of requests to known third-party analytics and tracker hosts.

blockChats.description: Best-effort blocking and hiding of known third-party chat widgets.

hideCookieBanners.description: Hide common cookie-consent overlays after loading. This does not click consent, set consent cookies, or bypass access controls.

hidePopups.description: Hide common newsletter, signup, and discount popups without clicking, submitting, or setting state.

paper.description: Paper size used for PDF rendering.

landscape.description: Use landscape orientation for PDF rendering.

name.description: Display name attached to the key.

plan.description: Current internal plan identifier. The trial identifier is displayed publicly as Free.

limit.description: Successful renders included in the current plan each calendar month.

remaining.description: Successful renders still available in the current month.

resetAt.description: Start of the next UTC calendar month, when the allowance replenishes.

failed.description: Failed reserved renders; these do not consume successful-render quota.

reserved.description: Currently reserved render slots for this key.

renderMs.description: Aggregate successful render time in milliseconds for the current month.

upgradeRequest.description: Latest paid-plan request attached to this key, or null when none exists.

links.description: Stable self-serve continuation links. They are informational and do not take payment, initiate an upgrade, or start implementation work.

implementationPilot.description: Describes the optional bounded $99 implementation service. The link itself starts neither work nor payment.
